channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Déjà 100 € de remise sur le Hisense C3, le nouveau vidéoprojecteur 4K idéal pour la Coupe du Monde
item.description: Le Hisense C3 est compact et facile à installer. Ainsi, il devient un excellent vidéoprojecteur pour des soirées foot entre amis. Toutefois, vous allez devoir mettre la main à la poche pour l'acquérir et ce, même avec cette remise de Boulanger.

item.title: Prime member? You can already get $335 in free perks ahead of Prime Day 2026 — here are the 8 best to claim before the event
item.description: Squeeze some extra value out of your subscription with these often-overlooked freebies and perks!

item.title: Your global strategy is broken if it starts with English
item.description: 76% of consumers prefer products with information in their native language, and 40% won’t buy if the information is not in their native language. There’s a quiet assumption embedded in how most companies operate: English is almost always seen as the starting point. I see it play out almost daily in conversations with leadership teams. It shows up in how product specs are written, how campaigns are planned, and how expansion is sequenced. ...

item.title: How to make the most of a hallway chat
item.description: Don’t underestimate the power of a quick hallway chat. It can be the best route to get a yes for a pressing problem. Most people think of exchanging words in the hallway as a quick “Hi, bye” event that doesn’t involve any messaging of importance. That’s true even if you add, “How’s it going?” or “Have a nice weekend.” Rarely do people think of these passing exchanges as having any substance....

item.title: How to ask for and take time off without getting penalized
item.description: When you do ask for time off, do it with confidence. You are not asking your employer for a favor. You are using a benefit you are entitled to. Summer is here. Even though most workplaces are not on an academic calendar, summer is still a time that many people choose to take vacations. Some of that decision is pragmatic—families with school-age children can bring their kids with them on a trip over the summer more easily than during the school year. Some of it is just that summer feels like a time when vacations ought to happen....

item.title: FIFA World Cup schedule today: Games, kickoff times, livestream info for June 14
item.description: Everything you need to know to watch the FIFA World Cup on June 14, including the day's schedule, kickoff times, and livestream information.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for June 14, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: How to watch Ivory Coast vs. Ecuador online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Ivory Coast vs. Ecuador in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free.

item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Sweden vs. Tunisia in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free.
